rows.description: A self-evolving skill synthesis framework for AI agents that autonomously generates, verifies, evolves, and reuses structured skill packages through co-evolutionary feedback loops.

Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.
SubnetAIQ OpenClaw Skill — Bittensor intelligence for AI agents. Momentum scores, whale flows, mining directory, institutional tracking.
A collection of agent skills for Claude Code, Copilot CLI, and other AI coding assistants
Capability Packaging System – package, distribute, and manage AI agent capabilities (skills, bundles, tools, prompts, templates, workflows)
The open catalog of AI agent skills — 2,000+ security-scanned skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more.
Learn what AI skills are and how to design, structure, and use them in real-world agent systems.
Local command center for multi-agent CLI workflows — see every session, swap skills on the fly, and chain agents into deterministic pipelines.

Configurable group operating system and LLM Wiki knowledge management kit for teams and families. Obsidian vault templates, agent skills, and scripts for building structured, AI-maintained markdown knowledge bases. Works with Claude Code, Cowork, or any LLM agent. Includes work and family variants.
A content management system for AI coding tools. Convert between tools, bundle content into shareable loadouts, and install rules, skills, agents, hooks, and MCP configs to the right place.

FestHub (Trial Version) is a web platform to explore and manage college fests in one place. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and deployed via AWS S3 static hosting. This MVP demonstrates frontend skills and cloud deployment, with future plans for authentication, backend integration, and enhanced UI/UX.

Production-ready MERN web app featuring secure JWT auth, role-based access, connection-based feeds, real-time messaging, and optimized MongoDB design. Demonstrates strong frontend, backend, and scalable system architecture skills.
Professional Java Backend Developer portfolio website showcasing experience, projects, skills, and certifications.

A comprehensive skills knowledge base covering the entire software development lifecycle — from design, implementation, testing to deployment. Systematized cross-platform development knowledge spanning iOS, Web, Backend, Scripting, DevOps, and quality assurance. 36 Skills / 952 guides / 43M+ characters.

Personal portfolio showcasing my projects, skills, and experience in Java, web development, and database management. This repository highlights my work in backend development and web applications, demonstrating my ability to build efficient, scalable software solutions using modern technologies.

PAPAIWAT is a web-based platform developed as a technical assessment project for Emwork Group. It demonstrates full-stack development skills, including system design, database architecture, backend development with Laravel, and frontend implementation using Blade.
Organize Claude Code into a software engineering department with agents, skills, and rules for structured development workflows
Build full-stack native apps for web, iOS, and Android with shared Firebase backend, Cursor AI, and production-ready patterns
This repository showcases my backend development learning journey, including the projects, experiments, and practice work I create as I improve my skills.
📌 Build a web app inspired by Pinterest using Flask, featuring user authentication, image uploads, and a dynamic feed to enhance backend skills.
Build and run code across Rust and other workspaces with Claw Code, a tool for parity checks, usage flows, and roadmap tracking
Provide open-source Claude Code skills to access HyperX wallet analytics, market data, and social feeds for enhanced trading insights.
💡 Learn Bash scripting basics and start writing scripts with this open-source guide. Perfect for beginners looking to enhance their skills.

Security scanner, cost tracker, and model router for the AI ecosystem. Scan Claude Code skills, MCP servers, and LLM plugins   for vulnerabilities. Track and forecast LLM API spend across providers. Get intelligent model recommendations based on task   type, cost, and latency. CLI-first, open source.
Documentation-first workflow installer skills for helping users install open-source agent workflow projects into Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, and related tools.
Open-source CLI scanner for agentic AI components — skills, MCP servers, system prompts

Teach any AI agent to run your content marketing. Open-source skill for PostKing - generate posts, plan content weeks, ship blog articles, build landing pages  - installable in Hermes, Claude, and Codex.
Curated open-source AI Agent Skills built by and for GMBA Class 19. Drop-in compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and any tool that supports the Agent Skills standard.
🧠 Open-source Agent Skill that turns AI into a K-12 courseware designer. For Claude Code, CodeBuddy, Cursor, Codex CLI and more. · 让 AI 懂教学设计的开源 Skill。
Open-source agent skills for Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini CLI. Connect AI agents to Google Analytics, Search Console, and Drive. From Temi (usetemi.com).

Computer Science student passionate about game development, app development, cybersecurity, and software engineering. Experienced in C++, Unity, and database systems. Currently building projects like Crownbound and exploring tools like Kali Linux and Burp Suite to expand practical skills. Always learning and improving.
Complete AI skill library for game development - 47 production-ready skills with intelligent error handling

The practical capstone version of GAME491 gives senior-level GAME students the opportunity to apply their learned skills in programming, art, game design, and other disciplines to a long-term, team based game development project that aims to emulate real world game development practices in a classroom setting.
This is a simple Tic Tac Toe game built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The project demonstrates basic front-end development skills and interactive UI design.

# Unity Practice  This repository contains my Unity and C# practice scripts and small experiments.  ## Purpose To improve my game development skills by building and testing core gameplay mechanics in Unity.
Review, score, and improve game design and code with 28 Claude Code skills for the full game development workflow

Carrom Game is an interactive web-based recreation of the classic board game, developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It features smooth gameplay, responsive design, and real-time interactions, showcasing game development and UI skills in a browser environment.

This is a personal web development portfolio showcasing my skills in HTML and CSS. It includes projects focused on modern, responsive, and user-friendly web design inspired by art, architecture, and gaming.
